keyFeatures.zh: 针对移动设备的响应式设计

description.en: Limited access to templates and basic features
description.zh: 有限的模板和基本功能访问权限

weaknesses.en: Limited features and templates in the free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐的功能和模板有限

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of pricing tiers for paid plans
weaknesses.zh: 未明确说明付费计划的价格层级

targetAudience.en: Small businesses and individuals looking for basic design tools
targetAudience.zh: 需要基本设计工具的小企业和个人

positioning.en: Tattfly positions itself as a user-friendly platform for creating custom designs with ease.
positioning.zh: Tattfly 将自己定位为一个易于使用的平台，用于轻松创建自定义设计
